meaning: n.委任,委托,代办(权),代理(权),犯(罪),佣金vt.委任,任命,委托,委托制作,使服役
examples: She gets 10% commission on each sale.
He gets a basic salary plus commission.
The salespeople work on commission only.
This will take two months, after which the commission will make its recommendation to the president.
The Cyprus National Commission for UNESCO promotes and supports initiatives that promote human rights.
